question: Was the entity that currently owns the BVNK digital asset infrastructure founded in the year 2021?

chain.fact: Mastercard acquired BVNK, making Mastercard the parent company/owner of the BVNK infrastructure.
Mastercard was founded in 1966 (whereas BVNK was founded in 2021 according to the article).

role_reference: the entity that currently owns the BVNK digital asset infrastructure

question: Is the parent company of the BVNK platform headquartered in Westchester County, New York?

chain.fact: Mastercard is the company acquiring BVNK.
Mastercard is headquartered in Purchase, New York.
Purchase is a hamlet located in the town of Harrison, in Westchester County, New York.

question: Is the current owner of the BVNK infrastructure a component of the S&P 100 index?

chain.fact: Mastercard is the entity that acquired BVNK.
Mastercard is a major public corporation traded under the ticker symbol MA.
Mastercard (MA) is a constituent of the S&P 100 index, whereas a private firm like BVNK is not.

question: Is the CEO of the parent company of BVNK a person who co-founded the business in 2021?

chain.fact: Mastercard acquired BVNK; Jesse Hemson-Struthers is the co-founder and CEO of BVNK.
The CEO of Mastercard is Michael Miebach.
Michael Miebach joined Mastercard in 2010 and is not a founder of the company (which was founded in 1966).

role_reference: the CEO of the parent company of BVNK
